---
title: "sentinel_perf.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\sentinel_perf.py"
loc: 51
complexity: 4
logic_score: 6.33
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 7.67
overall_score: 4.98
---

## Intent
The `sentinel_perf.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SentinelPerf, __init__, _res, profile_search, profile_tokenization, run_suite. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SentinelPerf, __init__, _res, profile_search, profile_tokenization, run_suite. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [vector](file://vector)

### Exports
- `SentinelPerf`
- `__init__`
- `_res`
- `profile_search`
- `profile_tokenization`
- `run_suite`
